channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple potholes over 30m patch, 28th March
item.description:
On the eastbound side of the road stretching from the P13 racecourse parking entrance to Tommy tailors lane there are multiple potholes, some blending into each other. These occupy the natural path of vehicles and are only avoidable by straddling the median line if the opposite carriageway is clear. It has been in this state since new year, despite numerous reports. It’s bad enough in a car, but at least they have 4 wheels. It won’t be long before a cyclist / motorcyclist has a potentially fatal accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Its a top layer removed, starting to remove the second layer tarmac, not yet through to type 2 compacted material. But i am assuming first level assessment of this, may not understand road construction architecture., 27th March
item.description:
Well broadly Cheltenham, but this beauty is at the end of mead Lane and the old bath Rd, sadly I am unable to accurately pin point it l. A . BECAUSE IT HAS MORE HOLES THAN THE SOMME in 1916 2, i would have hoped in our first world country, and digital world we would have a better way of reporting with some kind of feedback and traceability of the services we the tax payer are paying for. Your salary.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Farmfield Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in middle of road in line with centre road markings, 27th March
item.description:
In middle of road in line with centre road markings
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Hill, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight out on t-junction with Forrester close. Dangerous in darkness/low light., 27th March
item.description:
The first streetlight just after the T-junction for Forrester Close (as travelling North up Village Road towards Hayden Road) is out. This has been a problem for almost a year and makes turning into, or out of, Forrester Close very dangerous when it is dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fencing damaged and broken, 27th March
item.description:
The fencing / wooden barriers all along the edge of the main road of the Badgeworth estate and Cold Pool Lane is damaged / broken or falling apart. It looks awful and unsightly, let along a hazard. It either needs to be repaired or removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Egdon Crescent, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Holst grove sign post broken and hanging off, 27th March
item.description:
As above.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Holst Grove, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Slab with brail studs gif the blind broken, 27th March
item.description:
Slabs broken .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on Princess Elizabeth way, 27th March
item.description:
Flytipping under a tree on Princess Elizabeth Way, near to Orchard Avenue and the walkway linking Princess Elizabth Way with Quebec Drive. Please can you collect and dispose of properly. I don't know how long it's been there, I only saw it this afternoon. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 303, Princess Elizabeth Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Verge of footpath at northern end of westend lane hucclecote, 27th March
item.description:
There is flytipped garden waste on footpath verge can this be arranged to be cleared before tipping on this site increases

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West End Lane, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This pothole was previously reported and now being reported as being fixed large vehicles hitting it are making our house shake. Please fix this time., 27th March
item.description:
Pothole on Gretton road between fair winds and aldersmead having been reported on 20/02/2026 and now on the 27/03/2026 being reported as fixed has not been done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Gretton Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on yellow lines and in bus stop, 27th March
item.description:
Constant poor parking on double yellows and in bus stop on church road and in chapel hay lane particularly in the early evenings.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Hay Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large piece of chipboard left outside my house, 27th March
item.description:
I have reported this problem several times since Christmas and it’s still there. My hedge is now becoming damaged to to the chipboard leaning against it. Why has it not been collected?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 27th March
item.description:
Depression CW 600x600x50mm Standard TM (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 27th March

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 27th March
item.description:
Depression CW 1700x1100x60mm Standard TM (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and general building waste from building site, 27th March
item.description:
On the entrance to footpath at labelled. 2 large concrete drainage pipes that have been again filled with rubbish and building waste. Also on the ground just past these items between the metal partitions between building works and hedge , plastic building waste and plastic bottles from building site. I have also contacted Persimmon builders to get site manager to manage boundary line and clear up waste that builders have chick their bottle over the metal fence. I explained it was never like this before building works started and it needs sorting out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slabs, permanently covered with gravel from nearby area, 27th March
item.description:
Outside no. 6
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Hayes Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 27th March
item.description:
Cway pothole 720mmx300mmx52mm Standard TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 27th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 27th March
item.description:
